top.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
top.summary: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.

top.title: US House delivers rebuke to Trump as it votes to halt Iran war
top.summary: In the 215-208 vote, four Republicans joined Democrats to pass the measure, which is largely symbolic.

top.title: 'Crazy' phone call between Trump and Netanyahu complicates Iran talks
top.summary: Israel's PM laughed off reports of friction, but he has tested the patience of other US presidents.

top.title: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
top.summary: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.

top.title: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
top.summary: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.

top.title: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland back after online banking outage
top.summary: "We're aware some customers are having issues with our app and online banking. We're really sorry about this," Lloyds Bank posted on X.

title.#text: Amazon develops a warehouse robot workers can speak to
Shokz upgraded its open earbuds with better sound and a lighter design
Nintendo confirms it will sell a new Switch 2 with replaceable battery in the EU
